name: Group minting with high token diversity (640 tokens)
description: User with many different token types sending to a human that trusts Gnosis group (0x1158a69fa271c469f6b24455812b992e187e47b0). Tests edge ordering with high collateral diversity. Path goes Source → Group (mint) → Sink.
notes: E2E disabled: CirclesErrorAddressUintArgs - source address issue at block.
